w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: The Albany Capital Region Lions Club is dedicated to community service including vision care, youth programs, hunger relief, and humanitarian initiatives across the Capital Region. Our events bring together community members, local businesses, and civic leaders to create lasting impact.

The Albany Capital Region Lions Club is dedicated to community service including vision care, youth programs, hunger relief, and humanitarian initiatives across the Capital Region. Our events bring together community members, local businesses, and civic leaders to create lasting impact.
"Our sponsors do not simply fund an organization. They invest in Albany's future."
"Our sponsors do not simply fund an organization. They invest in Albany's future."
